meta.title: Soy Analista — Professional Tactical Analysis | World Cup 2026 & European Leagues
meta.description: Opposition reports, playing models, player profiles, and match analysis. Tactical coverage of World Cup 2026 and Europe's top five leagues. Data-driven methodology using FBref, Understat, and Transfermarkt.

hero.title: Professional tactical analysis
hero.subtitle: Playing models, opposition reports, player profiles, and match analysis. World Cup 2026 national teams and clubs from Europe's top five leagues.

about.title: About the project
about.subtitle: What Soy Analista is and how we work
about.introP1: Soy Analista is a tactical analysis platform that produces professional, data-driven reports for coaching staffs, analysts, journalists, and demanding fans.
about.introP2: The primary focus is the 2026 World Cup, with coverage of all 48 qualified nations. In parallel, club reports are published for teams across Europe's top five leagues: LaLiga, Premier League, Serie A, Bundesliga, and Ligue 1.
about.introP3: Each report is built from data sourced from FBref, Understat, Transfermarkt, and FIFA, processed through a proprietary 17-section methodology covering all five phases of play.

reportTypeDescs.informe: Full opposition analysis: 17 sections covering all 5 phases of play.
reportTypeDescs.playing-model: Tactical identity: how the team builds up, progresses, finishes, and defends.
reportTypeDescs.player-profile: Individual scouting with metric radar, percentiles, and tactical context.
reportTypeDescs.head2head: Direct comparison between two teams or players with comparative tables.
reportTypeDescs.set-pieces: Offensive and defensive set pieces: corners, free kicks, penalties, goal kicks.
reportTypeDescs.post-match: Tactical analysis of completed matches with key moments and ratings.
reportTypeDescs.newsletter: Periodic summaries with the latest news and publications.

about.sectionsIntro: Each Tier 1 report includes 17 sections covering everything from the institutional profile to the predicted XI, including tactical analysis of all 5 phases of play.
